titleStmt.title: SII 17.401: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 401. (A.R. No. 371 of 1904.) PAḺAṈI, DINDIGUL TALUK, MADURAI DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east base of the Paḻaṉi-Āṇḍavar shrine.
This inscription in characters of about the 14th century is dated in the reign of Tribhuvaṉachakravartin Kōṉērimēlkoṇḍāṉ and Avaṉivēṉdarāmaṉ is mentioned as his title.

This records the grant by the king, of Aiyapoyil (Aiyapoḻil) alias Avaṉivēndarāmanallūr in Vaikāvūr-nāḍu, as a taxfree dēvadāṉa to God Subrahmaṇya-ppiḷḷaiyār in Paḻaṉi in Vaikāvūr-nāḍu, for a service to be called Avaṉivēṉdarāmaṉ Sandhi, after himself. It mentions••••• koṇḍai Āṟu and a dam and Vaikāvūr Perumalai among the boundaries of the village.
Other details are lost as the inscription is incomplete.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuva[ ṉacakra] vatti koṉerimelkoṇṭāṉ vaikāvūr nāṭṭup paḻaṉiyil cuppiṟammaṇṇiyappiḷḷaiyār koyil tāṉattāṟku Ippiḷḷaiyāṟku nampe
rāl Avaṉiveṉtarāmaṉ cantikkum Aḻutupaṭikkum cāttuppaṭikkum Uḷḷiṭṭa viñcaṉat tukkum Iṉṉāṭṭil Aiyapoyilāṉa Avaṉiventarāmanallūr tevatāṉamāka mutalaṭaṅka Iṟaiyiliyāka tantom
Ivvūṟku nāṉkellai kiḻpāṟkellai koṇṭai Āṟṟukkum Aṇaikkum meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai vaikāvūr perumalaikku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai ṅkaraikku kiḻakkum va
ppāṟkellai Āṟṟu teṟku viḷainilattukkut Iṉṉāṉ kellaikkuḷpaṭṭa tevaṉ pati Uṭpaṭa naṉcey puṉceye ṉattamIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 17.401 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
